HOWEVER confidence capped at 60 because: (a) Price at 98% of immediate D1 dealing range — deep premium, limited upside before hitting Jun 3/22 supply, (b) Still 600-1,000 pts below major swing highs (30,642-30,762), (c) Tuesday profile risk — Classic Tuesday High possible if London session sweeps Monday high then reverses, (d) No M15 entry confirmation available. ICT Profile: Midweek Continuation Bullish — Monday set the tone with a strong bullish candle, Tuesday likely to continue higher OR form the week's high before Wednesday reversal. Key risk: if Tue fails to break above 29,792.63 (Mon high), it becomes a Classic Tuesday High setup.
